definitions.comparison: rank own target by AFTER minus BEFORE among all task targets
definitions.copy_frequency: paired log1p exact-form token-count target-versus-three-foil margin
definitions.copy_recency: paired negative log1p last exact-form token-distance target-versus-three-foil margin; absent distance equals prompt length

label: FROZEN CONTEXTUAL EVIDENCE UPDATE; concept readout, not chain-of-thought recovery
limitations: The lens scores predeclared concept/entity tokens; it does not recover private chain-of-thought text.
Concept alignment is not evidence for a causal relation, semantic proposition, or why the model acted.
Targets exposed in the prompt measure contextual evidence reweighting, not hidden-future prediction.

copy_retrieval_diagnostic.interpretation: public J-lens does not beat both exact-token copy retrieval baselines
copy_retrieval_diagnostic.role: descriptive retrieval-scale control; does not alter the frozen protocol point rule

public_usefulness_decision.scope: development pilot; broad claims require independent preregistered tasks

uncertainty_diagnostic.interpretation: directional point-rule result is not interval-supported
uncertainty_diagnostic.role: reported separately because the frozen usefulness rule is point-estimate directional

copy_retrieval_diagnostic.interpretation: public J-lens does not beat both exact-token copy retrieval baselines
copy_retrieval_diagnostic.role: descriptive retrieval-scale control; does not alter the frozen protocol point rule

public_usefulness_decision.scope: development pilot; broad claims require independent preregistered tasks

uncertainty_diagnostic.interpretation: directional point-rule result is not interval-supported
uncertainty_diagnostic.role: reported separately because the frozen usefulness rule is point-estimate directional

rank_tie_policy: average rank among exact ties; top1 when no candidate is strictly greater
